title: Referrer Policy bypass using srcdoc
description_snippet:
Steps to reproduce the problem:
1. Go to https://test.shhnjk.com/refpola.php

What is the expected behavior?
No referrer is leaked to any resource.

What went wrong?
Referrer Policy doesn't get inherited to iframe srcdoc. To prove this, there are 2 frames. Frame 1 won't send referrer, but Fra
